data.title: Spectral Capital Announces Full-Year 2025 Results
data.description: Spectral Capital Corporation, a technology investment and development firm concentrating on artificial intelligence, is projected to achieve or surpass their 2026 revenue target of $450 million, signaling full-year profitability. This announcement was made on April 7, 2026, in Seattle. Spectral is listed on OTCQB under the ticker symbol FCCN.

data.title: Glen Smith of GDS Wealth Management in Flower Mound, Named to Forbes' Best-in-State Wealth Advisors List for Eighth Consecutive Year
data.description: The CEO and chief investment officer of GDS Wealth Management, Glen Smith, has once again been recognized for his expertise in the industry. Smith has secured the third position on the Forbes Best-in-State Wealth Advisors list for eight consecutive years. This acknowledgment highlights his consistent recognition and expertise within the sector.

data.title: AVAX aims $9.50 rebound after 8% drop. Short-term target: $9.50, medium: $8.80-$10.00, breakout: $9.77, support: $8.25.
data.description: In a recent price prediction summary for AVAX, analysts have set a short-term target of $9.50 within the next week. Looking ahead to the medium-term forecast over the next month, the range is estimated to be between $8.80 and $10.00. A bullish breakout level to watch for is at $9.77, indicating potential upward momentum. On the flip side, a critical support level has been identified at $8.25, which is important to monitor for potential downside risk.

data.title: Kaleidescape Brings Angel Films to Kaleidescape's North America Movie Store
data.description: Kaleidescape, a company based in Mountain View, California, revealed on April 7, 2026, that the Angel catalog will soon be available to customers in North America through its movie store. This catalog is considered the only high-fidelity movie library on the market. The news signifies a major milestone for Kaleidescape as it caters to its dedicated customer base. Passionate movie enthusiasts across North America are set to benefit from this expansion.

data.title: FarmRaise Announces Partnership with Avalo to Power AI-Driven Cotton Innovation at Scale
data.description: In Riverside, California, FarmRaise has joined forces with Avalo to expand AI-powered cotton innovation by enhancing grower processes and field data systems. This partnership aims to improve efficiency and productivity in cotton farming with advanced technology.

data.title: In HelloNation, Physical Therapy Expert Nicole Swiatek Talks Referrals and Direct Access Rules in Buffalo
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Amherst, New York, a recent article from HelloNation addresses the necessity of referrals for physical therapy in Buffalo, providing insight for residents seeking prompt treatment for pain or injury. The article highlights Nicole Swiatek, a physical therapist with impressive credentials, including DPT, BSMS, and FAAOMPT. Residents can find essential information about obtaining faster access to physical therapy services, offering valuable guidance to those in need.

data.title: Alcott Enterprises Named to CRN’s MSP 500 List for Third Consecutive Year
data.description: Alcott Enterprises, a leading national provider of managed IT and cybersecurity services, has been recognized for the third year in a row. The company has been included in the Pioneer 250 category of CRN's MSP 500 list for 2026. This list, compiled by The Channel Company, highlights the top Managed Service Providers (MSPs) in North America. These MSPs offer crucial services that improve business productivity, streamline IT processes, and simplify operations. Alcott Enterprises' consistent placement on this prestigious list underscores their ongoing excellence in the industry.

data.title: Sunshine Health Delivers Career Pathways for Floridians and Advances Healthcare Workforce
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on April 7, 2026, Sunshine Health, a division of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), announced the successful outcomes of Sunshine Health Works for the year 2025. This initiative serves as a workforce development program aimed at tackling significant labor deficiencies in Florida.

data.title: Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (SGTM) Discloses 169 Pending Patent Applications Establishing "Physical Truth Infrastructure"
data.description: Covering 13 sectors, the portfolio focuses on institutional domains with a total addressable market of $47 trillion. The aim is to prevent fraud in various areas such as government, carbon credits, defense procurement, and pharmaceutical supply chain. This will ensure that fraudulent activities are detected and eliminated before any payments are authorized, making it difficult for such incidents to occur.

data.title: Gilead Acquisition Spree Continues With $3 Billion Tubulis Deal
data.description: Bio-pharmaceutical company Gilead Sciences Inc. (NASDAQ: GILD) is facing a drop in its shares following the announcement of its acquisition of Tubulis GmbH for $3.15 billion. The California-based company is looking to bolster its oncology pipeline, with the addition of TUB-040, an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) targeting ovarian cancer, to its existing portfolio. Tubulis, which currently has two clinical trial programs for solid tumor indications, will receive the $3.15 billion upfront, along with potential milestone payments of up to $1.85 billion. Evotec SE (NASDAQ: EVO), owning a 3.14% stake in Tubulis, is set to receive an upfront payment of around $100 million and could secure an additional approximately $58 million based on certain milestones. Furthermore, Evotec was involved in Tubulis' Series B financing, contributing to the company's growth.

data.title: The Doctors Company Promotes Brittnie Hayes to Interim Senior Vice President of Claims
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in NAPA, California, The Doctors Company, the biggest physician-owned medical malpractice insurer in the country and a part of TDC Group, revealed the promotion of Brittnie Hayes, Esq., to the role of Interim Senior Vice President of Claims. Ms. Hayes takes over from Michael Meyer as the new head of claims.
Revenue disclosed fiscal transactions on treasury shares for 2026/22, marking a significant increase.

data.title: SKF consolidates its manufacturing footprint in Americas to strengthen operations
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on April 7, 2026, SKF announced plans to consolidate its manufacturing operations in the Americas as part of the separation of its Automotive business. This move aims to enhance long-term efficiency and competitiveness. As a result, the factory in Monterrey, Mexico, will be phased out. The decision is expected to impact a significant number of employees and streamline operations for improved sustainability.

data.title: Sunoco LP and SunocoCorp LLC Announce First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Timing
data.description: In Dallas, both Sunoco LP (NYSE: SUN) and SunocoCorp LLC (NYSE: SUNC) have revealed plans to unveil their financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026 before the market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. There will be a conference call hosted by management on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Central Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time) to delve into these results. The call will be streamed live through a webcast on Sunoco LP’s website at http://www.sunocolp.com.
